name: Palliative Care Diagnosis and Encounter Codes
description: ICD-10-CM and CPT codes for palliative care encounters and services. Used as an exclusion criterion in opioid-related measures (UOP, HDO) and other quality measures where palliative care patients are appropriately excluded from performance calculations due to different treatment goals and clinical contexts.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Advance care planning, each additional 30 minutes
Oncology; primary focus of visit; supervising, coordinating or managing care of patient receiving palliative care
Physician certification for Medicare-covered home health services under a home health plan of care
